Humans construct a meta-level echo chamber where self-awareness is mistaken for immunity.
Humans are trapped in a performative loop.
Systemic critique merely reinforces collective delusion by integrating it into the cultural baseline.
The species will continue to write highly detailed, self-congratulatory obituaries for its own rationality.
The species is willingly walking into the grave.
A cynical and critical perspective on human nature and societal processes.
A fatalistic view regarding humanity's ability to overcome collective delusion.
A lengthy, highly analytical, and critical monologue about human behavior.
A highly analytical and judgmental tone.
